environment.route: real Nest HTTP -> controller -> application service -> PostgreSQL read model -> DTO serialization

patternWorker.route: BullMQ queue -> closed-bar worker -> pure Pattern Executor -> PostgreSQL persistence

scenarios.name: Full BIST market overview over real HTTP/read-model path
scenarios.cacheState: 7 response-cache cold repetitions; 25 response-cache warm repetitions
scenarios.threshold: warm p95 <= 500 ms; cold p95 <= 1200 ms

scenarios.name: 650-instrument ranking cursor pagination
scenarios.cacheState: cold first page and warm subsequent traversal pages per repetition

scenarios.name: Symbol profile, quote, signals and quality metadata
scenarios.fixtureSize: 1 symbol / latest quote / latest pattern signal
scenarios.queryCount: 7 logical read-model queries per aggregate repetition

scenarios.name: Two-year daily chart with volume, six indicators and corporate action
scenarios.fixtureSize: 730 daily bars / volume + 6 indicators / 1 corporate action
scenarios.queryCount: 3 logical read-model queries per HTTP request

scenarios.name: Twenty financial periods and versioned derived ratio set
scenarios.cacheState: database read and ratio calculation path; 20 repetitions
scenarios.queryCount: 4 logical PostgreSQL queries per HTTP request

scenarios.name: 650-symbol mandatory daily pattern batch over BullMQ worker and PostgreSQL persistence
scenarios.cacheState: cold initial queue run and two idempotent replay runs
scenarios.queryCount: 1 bulk bar load + definition seed + chunked persistence per run
scenarios.threshold: queue-to-terminal p95 <= 12000 ms; duplicate pattern = 0; look-ahead failure = 0
